settings.label: A Reflection of Intent
settings.heading: THE MIDNIGHT MIRROR
settings.quote: Look closer into the void, for the void is looking back. What you find is not an object, but a reflection of your own hidden power.

settings.label: Current Season
settings.heading: Equinox Ritual
settings.description: The veil is thinning. During the Equinox, all artifacts involving balance and transition gain 15% resonance.
